span.p:
Is the line material AND are its
operational drivers knowable?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TREND / INFLATION FACTOR
Simple growth or CPI uplift on prior actuals

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is this a cost base under active
scrutiny for a reset (new owner,
restructuring, cost-out program)?

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Do you have operating history
to calibrate the drivers against?
